name: Salmon Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (375°F).
2. Grease an 8-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese and chopped onion evenly over the bottom of the greased pie plate.
4. Drain the salmon and flake it into small pieces, then sprinkle over the cheese and onion.
5. In a bowl, whisk together eggs and milk until well combined.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the cheese, onions, and flaked salmon.
7. Sprinkle basil, tarragon, oregano, and parsley over the top of the quiche.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 minutes or until set. Check with a knife inserted into the center; it should come out clean when done.
9. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving hot.
